response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed that the video consists of a short introductory talk (00:00-01:58) followed by a full vocal song performance (01:58-04:58).
2. The song title is identified as 'PANIGHT' via on-screen text.
3. The performer is the VTuber unit 'NEGI☆U' (Minato Aqua, Oozora Subaru, Momosuzu Nene).
4. The composer/music is credited to KO3 (Hifumi,inc.) and the lyrics to maron (IOSYS).
5. Used search queries 'PANIGHT iOSYS lyrics' and 'PANIGHT iOSYS lyrics english translation' to retrieve the song lyrics.
6. Structured the data into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video is a full, high-energy 3D performance of the song "PANIGHT" by the Hololive VTuber unit NEGI☆U, consisting of Minato Aqua, Oozora Subaru, and Momosuzu Nene, with an introductory segment. The performers dance to the song on a stage with changing lighting and special effects.

scenes.description: The VTubers Minato Aqua, Oozora Subaru, and Momosuzu Nene stand on a stage, waving and talking to the camera to introduce their performance.
scenes.performer_in_video: Minato Aqua, Oozora Subaru, Momosuzu Nene

scenes.description: The VTubers perform the song 'PANIGHT' on stage. The song's title, lyrics writer (maron (IOSYS)), and composer (KO3 (Hifumi,inc.)) are displayed on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: NEGI☆U (Minato Aqua, Oozora Subaru, Momosuzu Nene)
